description:
The AngularVelocity3DRangeInitializer component makes particles have a random starting rotation angular speed along the X, Y, and Z axies.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.MinValue: The minimum value a particle can have for rotation speed along the X, Y, and Z axies.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum value a particle can have for rotation speed along the X, Y, and Z axies.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
